limitations: A reviewed mapping proves identity and evidence reachability, not semantic parity.
Direct host tests remain mandatory per function under the microtask gate.
O10 requires a reviewer independent from the implementer and this automation.
Hardware behavior remains unverified until the controlled NX809J procedure runs.

mappings.mapping_basis: Explicit shared reconstruction of the GKI 6.12 uaccess helper body reached by eight stock callers and matched exactly against the stock AArch64 body
